[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001100 3
1 11010111 6
2 01111000 4
3 00111101 5
4 11101100 5
5 01110000 3
6 00101100 3
7 11100001 4

01 10 11101101 6
12 21 11011111 7
23 32 11111111 a

67 76 01111100 5
70 07 11101101 6

13 31 01111100 5
24 42 11111111 a
35 53 11111100 6

57 75 11101100 5 match 4
60 06 11110001 5
71 17 01101100 4

50 05 11101101 6
61 16 01111100 5
72 27 11111111 a
